content:
- Executed task `.ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/05c-task-zero-panic-unwrap-expect-across-runtime-and-tests.md` from TO BE VERIFIED to NOW EXECUTE.
- Performed deep skeptical verification sweep (high-parallel rg checks across checklist files) and altered the plan: added strict all-targets clippy guard, acceptance grep evidence step, and stale-artifact recovery path.
- Implemented enforcement changes: `src/lib.rs` deny policy now always active (no `cfg(test)` bypass); `Makefile` lint now includes strict `--lib`, `--tests`, and strict `--all-targets` passes.
- Captured evidence in `.ralph/evidence/05c-zero-panic/` before/after scans and gate logs.
- First gate run failed during `make test` with stale archive/missing `*.rcgu.o`; followed plan by running `cargo clean` once and reran full sequence successfully.
- All required gates passed after recovery: `make check`, `make test`, `make test-bdd`, `make lint`.
- Updated task file status/checklists to done/passes/passing true, added a new cross-app learning to `AGENTS.md`, and ran `.ralph/task_switch.sh`.
- Next step after this context: commit all changes with required message format and hand off completion summary.
